test_steps: 1. Run invariant query on leads joined with users
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO users(user_id,status,...) VALUES('<UID>','active',...); INSERT INTO leads(lead_id,owner_id,stage,...) VALUES('<LID>','<UID>','captured',...);
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l JOIN users u ON u.user_id=l.owner_id WHERE u.status='inactive' AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND l.stage NOT IN ('handed_off','rejected');
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM leads WHERE lead_id='<LID>'; DELETE FROM users WHERE user_id='<UID>';

test_name: Checker rejects pending config version

test_name: Rollback active config version restores prior version
test_steps: 3. Query DB: SELECT status FROM configuration_versions WHERE configuration_version_id='<CV_CURRENT_UUID>'
4. Query DB: SELECT status FROM configuration_versions WHERE configuration_version_id='<CV_PRIOR_UUID>'
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.status='rolled_back'; data.restoredVersionId='<CV_PRIOR_UUID>'; DB: CV_CURRENT.status='rolled_back'; CV_PRIOR.status='active'; audit_logs row with detail.new_status='rolled_back'
postconditions: INV-04: rollback_ref row is now active
INV-03: no two active versions for same config_type+config_ref

test_name: Approve version already in active state returns CONFLICT
expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; version status unchanged='active'

test_name: Approve with future effective_at sets status to approved not active
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.status='approved' (NOT 'active' since effective_at is in future); audit and outbox rows present

test_name: RM cannot access config governance endpoints

test_name: Concurrent checkers — second approval returns CONFLICT
test_steps: 1. Simultaneously POST /api/v1/admin/config/<CV_UUID>/approve from checker_1 and checker_2
expected_result: One request returns HTTP 200 with status='active'; second returns HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; final DB state has exactly one approval (optimistic guard)

test_name: After rollback, exactly one active version exists for config_type+config_ref
preconditions: Active version CV_CURRENT with rollback_ref=CV_PRIOR exists
test_steps: 2. Run invariant query for dual-active versions
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows (no dual active versions)

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT config_type, config_ref, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM configuration_versions WHERE status='active' AND config_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY config_type, config_ref HAVING COUNT(*)>1;
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM configuration_versions WHERE configuration_version_id IN ('<CV_CURR>','<CV_PRIOR>');

test_name: Circuit breaker opens after threshold failures and fast-fails subsequent calls

4. Assert adapter.call spy on second call
expected_result: First call: Redis sets 'cb:los_handoff'='open'; second call: throws UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE with error_code='CB_OPEN'; adapter.call spy for second call invoked 0 times

test_name: OutboxService.emit inserts pending row in same transaction as state change
test_steps: 1. Call OutboxService.emit(EventCode.LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED, 'Lead', '<LEAD_UUID>', maskedPayload, tx) within active transaction
3. Query DB: SELECT * FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<LEAD_UUID>' AND event_code='LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED'
expected_result: event_outbox row exists with status='pending'; event_code='LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED'; aggregate_type='Lead'; schema_version=1; published_at is NULL
postconditions: INV-01: no null event_code
INV-07: schema_version>=1

test_name: Transaction rollback removes outbox row — no partial state
preconditions: DB error mocked after OutboxService.emit but before commit
test_steps: 3. Force DB error (duplicate stage_history_id) before commit
5. Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<ROLLBACK_TEST_UUID>'
expected_result: event_outbox count=0 for test aggregate_id; leads.stage unchanged; stage_history has no new row

di_meta.setup_sql: -- No pre-insert; row should not exist after rollback
di_meta.action: Begin tx; emit outbox row; force error; rollback
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<ROLLBACK_TEST_UUID>';
di_meta.cleanup: -- Nothing to clean; rollback should leave no rows

test_name: Publisher polls pending rows and marks them published
test_steps: 3. Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE status='pending'
expected_result: publishMessage called 3 times; all 3 rows have status='published' and published_at NOT NULL; no pending rows remain
postconditions: INV-04: published rows have published_at not null
INV-05: pending rows have published_at null

test_name: PubSub failure after MAX_PUBLISH_RETRIES marks outbox row as failed
test_steps: 2. Query DB: SELECT status FROM event_outbox WHERE event_id='<EV_UUID>'
expected_result: status='failed' after 3 failed attempts; publisher does not retry beyond MAX; dead-letter counter incremented; Cloud Monitoring outbox_dead_letter_total+=1

test_name: Payload PII is masked before outbox insert
test_steps: 1. Call OutboxService.emit with payload: {mobile:'9876543210', pan:'ABCDE1234F', name:'Jaya Kumar'}
2. Query DB: SELECT payload FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<MASK_TEST_UUID>'
expected_result: DB payload.mobile != '9876543210'; DB payload.pan != 'ABCDE1234F'; raw values absent; masked formats present (e.g., '98xxxxxx10','ABCDE****F')
postconditions: INV-02: no raw mobile in payload
INV-03: no raw PAN in payload

test_name: Concurrent publisher guard — markPublished with WHERE status=pending prevents double-mark
test_steps: 1. Both publisher instances call publishMessage for same event_id simultaneously
3. Query: rows affected by each UPDATE
expected_result: Exactly one markPublished UPDATE returns 1 row affected; second returns 0 rows (WHERE status='pending' guard fails); published_at reflects first writer only
postconditions: INV-04: exactly one published_at per row

test_name: Publisher batch respects PUBLISHER_BATCH_SIZE LIMIT — only 100 of 200 pending rows processed per cycle
test_steps: 3. Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE status='pending'
expected_result: publishMessage called exactly 100 times; 100 rows status='published'; 100 rows still status='pending'

test_name: At-least-once: crash between publish and markPublished causes re-publish on next poll
preconditions: publishMessage succeeds but markPublished throws (simulating crash)
test_steps: 1. First poll: publishMessage succeeds; markPublished throws; row still status='pending'
2. Second poll: publishMessage called again; markPublished succeeds
3. Query DB: SELECT status FROM event_outbox WHERE event_id='<AT_LEAST_ONCE_UUID>'
expected_result: publishMessage invoked twice (at-least-once); row eventually status='published'; idempotent consumer must handle duplicate delivery
postconditions: INV-04: published_at set after second poll succeeds

test_name: CONSENT_WITHDRAWN event emitted with correct metadata end-to-end
preconditions: Lead '<LEAD_UUID>' has active consent with purpose='marketing'
test_steps: 1. Withdraw consent via ConsentService.withdraw('<CONSENT_UUID>', reason='customer request')
2. Query DB: SELECT * FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<CONSENT_UUID>' AND event_code='CONSENT_WITHDRAWN'
expected_result: event_outbox row exists with event_code='CONSENT_WITHDRAWN'; aggregate_type='Consent'; schema_version=1; payload is masked; status='pending'
postconditions: INV-01: event_code not null
INV-07: schema_version>=1

test_name: Invalid event_code passed to emit throws INTERNAL_ERROR and inserts no row
test_steps: 2. Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<UUID>'
expected_result: emit throws InternalException (maps to HTTP 500 INTERNAL_ERROR); no row inserted in event_outbox; error logged with correlation_id

test_name: Every committed lead stage transition has a corresponding event_outbox row
test_steps: 1. Trigger stage transition: captured -> assigned for '<LEAD_UUID>'
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows (every stage_history row has matching outbox row)

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l INNER JOIN stage_history sh ON sh.lead_id=l.lead_id LEFT JOIN event_outbox eo ON eo.aggregate_id=l.lead_id AND eo.event_code='LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED' WHERE sh.occurred_at >= NOW()-INTERVAL '1 minute' AND eo.event_id IS NULL;
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='<LEAD_UUID>'; DELETE FROM stage_history WHERE lead_id='<LEAD_UUID>'; DELETE FROM leads WHERE lead_id='<LEAD_UUID>';

test_name: No raw mobile or PAN in any event_outbox payload
preconditions: event_outbox table has rows emitted from various FRs
test_steps: 1. Run INV-02 query for unmasked mobile
2. Run INV-03 query for unmasked PAN
expected_result: Both queries return 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: -- Use existing event_outbox rows from prior test runs
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE payload::text ~ '"mobile"\s*:\s*"[6-9][0-9]{9}"'; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE payload::text ~ '"pan[^"]*"\s*:\s*"[A-Z]{5}[0-9]{4}[A-Z]"';
